_status: LOCKED architecture (2026-06-11). Per-project image ORDER + HERO are proposed by the agent at generation time and confirmed by Lisa on the sandbox preview.
_mandate: Simple, architecturally sound, future-proof — any later agent resolves images the same way with zero ambiguity.

architecture.sourceOfTruth: THIS FILE. Apps and agents resolve a project's images by reading its entry here — never by crawling the storage bucket.
rules: 1. Each SSOT project id maps to exactly ONE canonical folder (relative to publicBase).
2. Collections (surface-surveys, luxuriate-in-discomfort) map each CHILD id to its own folder.
3. Image ORDER is explicit + curated (agent proposes -> Lisa confirms). Never derived from filename sort.
4. hero = the lead image for the project.
5. video[] / audio[] hold installation multimedia (real .mp4/.mp3 exist).
6. URL = publicBase + each path segment URL-encoded (spaces -> %20), joined by '/'.
7. Adding a project = add ONE entry here (id, folder). No code change anywhere else.
8. NON-DESTRUCTIVE: existing bucket files are never renamed or moved (the live website depends on them). This manifest absorbs all naming inconsistency.

surface-surveys._decision: Use kebab 'surface-surveys/' (all 6 chapters incl. Craters). Title DISPLAYS all-caps via CSS.

omani-landscapes._note: many color variants of same shots — curate at generation

winterblue._decision: web-ready set (14). Full set in WINTERBLUE/photos (51) if more needed.

flipped._note: uppercase FLIPPED/ is working files — ignored

palouse._status: FOLDER PENDING — media not yet uploaded to Supabase (Nikon D800 prints)

21st-century-bw._status: Installation per Lisa (corrected from Photography 06-11); verify folder contents + any video/audio at generation

luxuriate-in-discomfort._note: 3 sub-projects per Lisa; finalizing from the in-progress intake pass. LUX Public Art lives UNDER Luxuriate (not separate).
